---
title: "Data Integration"
author: "Sara gosline"
date: "2024-12-18"
output: html_document
---

This file collects existing data - to date it is transcritpion factor and kinase enrichment stats from various drugs and time points, and experiments with ways to incorporate them across different studies.
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)


library(synapser)
library(dplyr)
synLogin()

tfs<-readr::read_csv(synapser::synGet('syn64420968')$path)|>
  mutate(sample=='MN.2')

kins<-readr::read_csv(synapser::synGet('syn64322657')$path)

```

## Data summary
First we need to collect where we're at with all the different types of analyses and time points


```{r cars}

##figure out how many changes we have in each

```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
